LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT CONFIRMS THE TENTATIVE RULING WITH MODIFICATION.DEFENDANTS SASSAN KAFAYI, D.D.S., A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION, AND SASSAN KAFAYI'S APPLICATION FOR STAY OF ENFORCEMENT OF SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT PENDING APPEAL IN NEW JERSEY IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANTS FILE AN UNDERTAKING IN THE AMOUNT OF $200,000.00. DEFENDANT REPRESENTS THAT TWO PIECES AT ISSUE HELD SUBJECT TO LEVY. FOR FULL RULING SEE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT AND .DOC (WORD) MINUTES. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR NO. 6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Defendants Sassan Kafayi, Dds, A Prof. Corp. And Sassan Kafayi'S Motion To Stay Enforcement Of Judgment And Hearing Re: Bond
Off Calendar Jun-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Richard A. Solomon of the law offices of Solomon Grindle Lidstad & Wintringer (858.793.8500, ext. 222) appears via telephone as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Malcolm Leader-Picone of the law offices of Leader-Picone & Young (510-444-2404) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides in open court.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

Defendants Sassan Kafayi, D.D.S., a Professional corporation, and Sassan Kafayi's application for stay of enforcement of sister-state judgment pending appeal in New Jersey is granted on the condition that Defendants file an undertaking in the amount of $200,000.00. Defendants represents that the two pieces of dental equipment at issue being held subject to levy. For full ruling see reporter's transcript and .doc (Word) minutes. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR No. 6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com

payments.description: REQ OR STIP AND ORDER W/O HEARING
